svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="qZpv-kiM_JoqNdZnIw3i" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-404" dy="-98" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="760" pageHeight="330" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=16;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="图：前向算输出，反向沿链式法则回传梯度" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="720" x="20" y="12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fwdlbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#1e6b1e;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="① 前向：逐层计算输出 →" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="240" x="40" y="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="x" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="输入 x" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="110" x="40" y="118" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="层 f₁
(w₁)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="110" x="220" y="118" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="层 f₂
(w₂)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="110" x="400" y="118" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="损失 L" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="110" x="580" y="118" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f1" edge="1" parent="1" source="x" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.8;fontColor=#1e6b1e;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=1;exitY=0.35;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.35;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="h1" value="a₁"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2" edge="1" parent="1" source="h1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.8;fontColor=#1e6b1e;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=1;exitY=0.35;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.35;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="h2" value="a₂"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f3" edge="1" parent="1" source="h2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.8;exitX=1;exitY=0.35;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.35;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="L" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b1" edge="1" parent="1" source="L" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1.8;dashed=1;fontColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.7;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="h2" value="∂L/∂a₂"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b2" edge="1" parent="1" source="h2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1.8;dashed=1;fontColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.7;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="h1" value="∂L/∂a₁"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3" edge="1" parent="1" source="h1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1.8;dashed=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.7;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.7;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="x" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bwdlbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="② 反向：逐层回传梯度 ←" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="240" x="40" y="196" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;spacingRight=10;" value="梯度 = 损失对某参数的偏导，指明把参数往哪调能让 L 下降。链式法则：∂L/∂w₁ = (∂L/∂a₂)(∂a₂/∂a₁)(∂a₁/∂w₁)，即把后层传来的梯度逐层相乘往回算。PyTorch 的 autograd 在前向时记录计算图，调用 loss.backward() 自动完成反向传播。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="72" width="720" x="20" y="236" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: ② 反向：逐层回传梯度 ←

div.div: 梯度 = 损失对某参数的偏导，指明把参数往哪调能让 L 下降。链式法则：∂L/∂w₁ = (∂L/∂a₂)(∂a₂/∂a₁)(∂a₁/∂w₁)，即把后层传来的梯度逐层相乘往回算。PyTorch 的 autograd 在前向时记录计算图，调用 loss.backward() 自动完成反向传播。
